name: slide-reader-ai
description: Multimodal AI-Powered Conversational Slide Reader with Intelligent Summarization and Voice Interaction

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:ai"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install && cd ../ai-server && pip install -r requirements.txt
